columns.name: id
columns.description: Internal numeric invoice ID from Invoiced; primary key for the invoice table.

columns.name: object
columns.description: Discriminator for the record type; always 'invoice' for this sheet.

columns.name: customer
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the billed customer (customers.id).

columns.name: name
columns.description: Optional invoice title or summary; blank in the sample data.

columns.name: number
columns.description: Human-readable invoice number, e.g. INV-0016.

columns.name: autopay
columns.description: Indicates whether this invoice is set to be automatically paid when due.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency of the invoice amounts (ISO 4217 lowercase).

columns.name: draft
columns.description: Whether the invoice is still in draft state (not yet issued).

columns.name: closed
columns.description: Indicates if the invoice is closed (no further changes expected).

columns.name: paid
columns.description: Whether the invoice has been fully paid.

columns.name: status
columns.description: High-level invoice status (e.g., paid, voided).

columns.name: attempt_count
columns.description: Number of payment attempts made for this invoice.

columns.name: next_payment_attempt
columns.description: Timestamp or date of the next scheduled payment attempt, if any.

columns.name: subscription
columns.description: Identifier of the related subscription, for recurring invoices (blank in sample).

columns.name: date
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) representing the invoice issue date.

columns.name: due_date
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) representing the invoice due date.

columns.name: payment_terms
columns.description: Payment terms applied to this invoice (e.g., NET 60, AutoPay).

columns.name: purchase_order
columns.description: Customer purchase order number associated with this invoice, if provided.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Free-form notes printed on the invoice.

columns.name: subtotal
columns.description: Invoice subtotal before taxes and discounts.

columns.name: total
columns.description: Total amount of the invoice after taxes and discounts.

columns.name: balance
columns.description: Outstanding balance remaining on the invoice.

columns.name: payment_plan
columns.description: Identifier of an associated payment plan, if the invoice is on installments.

columns.name: url
columns.description: Public URL where the hosted invoice can be viewed.

columns.name: payment_url
columns.description: URL where the customer can pay the invoice online.

columns.name: pdf_url
columns.description: Direct URL to download the invoice PDF.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the invoice record was created.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the invoice record was last updated.

columns.name: items_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON array of invoice line items, including quantities, unit prices, and catalog references.

columns.name: discounts_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON array of discounts applied to the invoice.

columns.name: taxes_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON array of tax lines applied to the invoice, including amounts and tax rates.

columns.name: ship_to_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON object describing the shipping address and contact for the invoice, if different from billing.

columns.name: metadata_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON object of arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the invoice.
